title: salix × oligotricha
intro: Salix × oligotricha, also known as the hybrid willow, is a plant species that belongs to the Salix genus, resulting from the cross between Salix purpurea and Salix viminalis. The medicinal properties of Salix × oligotricha include its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and an antiseptic, making it useful in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and improve respiratory health, making it a valuable remedy for colds and flu. The herbal preparations of Salix × oligotricha include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
